name: Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>必</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>中</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のピン
desc: If you control an Insect monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" you control. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an Insect monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" you control. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" once per turn.
eff: If you control an Insect monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" you control. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Pin the Bullseye" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
